children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: In addition to amounts made available under , there are authorized to be appropriated such sums as are necessary to carry out , to remain available until expended.section 3231 of this titlesection 3149(c)(2) of this title

children.heading: Federal share
children.label: b Federal share
children.text: The Federal share of the cost of activities funded with amounts made available under subsection (a) shall be up to 100 percent.
